description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof that doubles as a helipad, complete with a helicopter parked on top. The front facade showcases three large arched windows and a recessed entry area, while the side reveals a spacious outdoor pool and lounging area. A cylindrical tower structure is attached to one side, adding architectural interest and likely housing a staircase or elevator. The rear of the house includes a large horizontal window, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light gray material with blue-tinted glass for the windows and pool. The overall design suggests luxury and exclusivity, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed luxury house with a rooftop helipad, arched windows, a cylindrical tower, and an outdoor pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, lounge chairs, three arched windows, and the cylindrical tower on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open pool area, cylindrical tower, and the full length of the house with arched windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large horizontal window, rooftop helipad, and the cylindrical tower at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with arched windows, the cylindrical tower, and a partial view of the rooftop helipad.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of arched windows with a large horizontal window at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, flanked by arched windows and adjacent to a cylindrical tower
